source_pr.title: ddl: remove backgroud worker, use delete-range to speed up something.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: remove backgroud worker, use delete-range to speed up something.
fix_pattern: ddl: remove backgroud worker, use delete-range to speed up something.
